facebook.caption:
6,436 reviews. 4.5 stars. And a palm-lined beach right outside your villa.

Novotel Phu Quoc Resort sits on Đường Bào with chic rooms, private pool villas, and the kind of resort energy that actually delivers on the photos. Contemporary design. Real beach access. No surprises.

This is the one travelers keep coming back to rate. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
